title: Physical Therapy Aide
description: Support our physical therapy team at Mount Sinai Health, helping patients recover and regain mobility through compassionate care and attention to detail.
responsibilities: Assist patients with exercises and therapeutic activities under therapist supervision
Help patients transfer safely between equipment and positions
Maintain clean, organized therapy spaces and equipment
Document patient progress and communicate updates to therapists
Provide emotional support and encouragement to patients during recovery
Help schedule appointments and maintain patient records

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
